name: Snow White
movie: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
description: You are sweet, hopeful, and naturally caring. You bring warmth to others and try to see the good in difficult situations.
quote: Your kindness is your quiet strength.

name: Cinderella
description: You stay graceful under pressure and keep believing in better days, even when things are hard.
quote: You are proof that hope can survive anything.

name: Aurora
description: You are calm, elegant, and imaginative. You value peace, beauty, and meaningful connections.
quote: Your quiet presence leaves a lasting impression.

name: Ariel
description: You are adventurous and curious, always wondering what else life has to offer.
quote: You are not afraid to dream bigger.

name: Belle
description: You value knowledge, kindness, and seeing beyond first impressions.
quote: Your heart and mind are equally powerful.

name: Jasmine
description: You know your worth and are not afraid to challenge expectations or speak up for yourself.
quote: You were never meant to live by someone else’s rules.

name: Pocahontas
description: You are thoughtful, grounded, and deeply connected to the world around you.
quote: You listen deeply, even when others rush to speak.

name: Mulan
description: You are courageous and protective. You rise to the occasion when people need you.
quote: Your strength comes from being true to yourself.

name: Tiana
description: You are determined, practical, and willing to work hard for the future you want.
quote: Your dreams matter, but so does the work behind them.

name: Rapunzel
description: You are imaginative, expressive, and always open to discovering something new.
quote: Your creativity turns ordinary moments into magic.

name: Merida
description: You are fearless, independent, and willing to fight for your own path.
quote: You do not wait for permission to become yourself.

name: Moana
description: You are driven by purpose and curiosity. You are willing to go beyond your comfort zone when something matters.
quote: You are called to explore, lead, and restore.

name: Raya
description: You are strategic, protective, and stronger than you sometimes let people see.
quote: Trust is hard, but your courage makes healing possible.
